title: Rs. 5,000/- allowance for 3.3 Mn families
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); The Ministry of Women and Child Affairs and Social Empowerment said that an allowance of Rs. 5,000 will be given to 3.3 Million families facing financial difficulties from this month for the following 6 months.

The Secretary to the Ministry of Women and Child Affairs and Social Empowerment Neil Bandara Hapuhinna says that the World Bank (WB) and the Asian Development Bank (ADB) will provide funds for this program
Sri Lanka: Indian Govt. & US Treasury delegations to visit tomorrow (23), and next week (27)
Rear Admiral Upul De Silva appointed as Chief of Staff of the Sri Lanka Navy
